source_verification_note: Savings ranges (p10/p50/p90) are internal consulting estimates. industry_sources entries indicate real published works that directionally support each lever's savings thesis. Specific percentages are not directly quoted from these sources.

levers.description: ISO 50001 audit + variable speed drives + waste heat recovery. Typical 12–22% energy bill reduction.
industry_sources: CEA — Annual Report 2023-24 (cea.nic.in/annual-report/) — industrial energy consumption benchmarks and efficiency improvement data
Bureau of Energy Efficiency (BEE) — Perform Achieve Trade (PAT) Scheme results (beeindia.gov.in/content/pat-cycle) — energy savings achieved by designated consumers
McKinsey & Company — Reducing Energy Consumption in Manufacturing (mckinsey.com/capabilities/operations/our-insights) — 10-25% energy savings potential in industrial settings

levers.description: Hub-and-spoke model; milk-run consolidation; 3PL contract renegotiation.
industry_sources: CRISIL — India Logistics Report 2024 (crisil.com) — logistics cost as % of GDP and network optimisation benchmarks
DPIIT — Trade Facilitation and Logistics Performance Data 2024 (dpiit.gov.in) — logistics efficiency benchmarks
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — specific network redesign savings range is an internal consulting estimate for Indian manufacturing

levers.description: Reconcile GSTR-2B vs purchase register; recover blocked credits under Sec 17(5) exclusions.
industry_sources: GST Act 2017 Section 17(5) — blocked credit categories (statutory source, not a benchmark)
GSTN — Annual Statistics on ITC claims and reconciliation gaps (gstn.org.in) — ITC leakage rates across industries
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — 2-8% recovery range is an internal consulting estimate based on ITC reconciliation engagements

levers.description: Reduce MRO vendors 40%; framework contracts with quarterly rebates; VMI for top-20 SKUs.
industry_sources: Hackett Group — World-Class Performance Study: Procurement Benchmarks 2024 (thehackettgroup.com/research/) — MRO supplier consolidation savings benchmarks
CAPS Research — MRO Procurement Benchmarking (capsresearch.org/benchmarking/) — maintenance spend under management benchmarks
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — specific MRO consolidation savings range is an internal consulting estimate

levers.description: Insource sub-optimal job-work where BEP positive; renegotiate utilisation-based contracts.
industry_sources: McKinsey & Company — Make vs Buy in Manufacturing Operations (mckinsey.com/capabilities/operations/our-insights) — insourcing decision framework and savings potential
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — contract manufacturing optimisation savings range is an internal consulting estimate for Indian diversified manufacturers

levers.description: Identify short-term/low-value leases mis-classified as ROU; correct to P&L; recover cash flow.
industry_sources: ICAI — Ind AS 116 Leases — Implementation Guidance (icai.org) — statutory accounting standard with practical expedients for short-term and low-value leases
MCA — Indian Accounting Standards Notification 2015, updated 2019 (mca.gov.in) — Ind AS 116 regulatory basis
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — 1-6% cash flow recovery range is an internal consulting estimate based on Ind AS 116 transition reviews
